name: bitwarden
title: Bitwarden
description: Search, create, and manage Bitwarden vault items via the rbw CLI. Supports self-hosted Bitwarden / Vaultwarden.
author: asm0dey

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Vault
commands.description: Search and act on vault items

commands.name: sync-vault
commands.title: Sync Vault
commands.description: Pull latest vault state from the Bitwarden server

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: API Client ID
preferences.description: Bitwarden API client ID (Settings → Security → Keys)

preferences.name: serverCertsPath
preferences.title: Self-signed CA Bundle Path
preferences.description: Path to a PEM file with your CA chain. Injected as SSL_CERT_FILE for rbw.

preferences.name: syncOnLaunch
preferences.title: Sync on Launch
preferences.label: Sync vault on first launch
preferences.description: Run `rbw sync` after the first unlock of each session

preferences.name: fetchFavicons
preferences.title: Fetch Favicons
preferences.label: Show favicons for login items
preferences.description: Display favicons next to login items

preferences.name: repromptIgnoreDuration
preferences.title: Reprompt Grace Window
preferences.description: How long to skip the master-password reprompt for sensitive items after a successful prompt

preferences.name: windowActionOnCopy
preferences.title: Window Action on Copy
preferences.description: What Vicinae should do after copying a value to the clipboard

preferences.name: shouldCacheVaultItems
preferences.title: Cache Vault Items
preferences.label: Cache non-sensitive fields locally
preferences.description: Encrypted local cache of names/URIs/folders for fast list rendering. Sensitive fields (passwords, notes, cards, identity) are never cached.
